name: Pull Request
about: Submit a pull request to improve Max

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Token efficiency optimization

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document
- [ ] My changes don't break existing behavior (backward compatible)
- [ ] I have tested my changes
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] Token count is within budget (see `token-budget-check.yml`)

## Testing

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here.
